SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Set For Trial On Mar-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-11-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tammy McNaught (Bancal Management Corp) / Defendant in Pro Per;
/ Plaintiff in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Apellant/ Defendant testifies on his/her own behalf. No documentary evidence introduced.


Respondent/ Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduce:

Exhibit A - HOA meeting suggestions
Exhibit B - 1075 MArket Street HOA operating rules and regulations
Exhibit C - Security Suggestions Sept. 13, 2021
Exhibit D - photographs of garage and storage units
Exhibit E - call logs
Exhibit F - Declaration of Tammy McNaught

At the conclusion of the hearing, The Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. Judge: Honorable Sharon Reardon; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Reporter: NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
